text.message: I dont think I'm the big threat here
I can’t block orange anywhere unless I want to solo him
you have brick port 9 5 brick and 10 ore
you can compensate with the wood port
blue isnt on a good position?
black, ur asking me 2 woods for 1 ore
orange we will lose because of u
u were the ones leaving 6 4 11 to blue
i even stole his wood port
that would be his strongest one
you having the wood port is even stronger
not so strong as your brick one
people are way too focused on me. you'll see
i know youre not the only threat
sorry its my way of playing
